auth.noTenantFound: No tenant found. Please contact support.
auth.passwordResetLinkSent: If this email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.emailNotVerified: Email address is not verified. Please check your inbox.
auth.passwordSetupLinkSent: If this email is registered, a password setup link has been sent.
auth.setupRequired: Please set up your account password first.
auth.loginRequired: Email found. Please enter your password to log in.
auth.alreadySetup: Account already set up. Please log in or use forgot password if needed.
auth.emailNotFound: This email address is not registered in our system.

email.applicationApprovedSubject: Congratulations! Your Application Has Been Approved
email.resetPasswordBody: You requested to reset your password. Click the button below to proceed:
email.setupBody: Welcome to the Student Information System! Please click the button below to set up your password and access your account.
email.resetIgnore: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
email.setupIgnore: If you were not expecting this invitation, please ignore this email.
email.approvalBody: We are delighted to inform you that your application has been approved! Welcome to {courseName}.
email.nextStep1: Save your Student ID ({rollNumber}) for future reference
email.nextStep2: Access the Learning Management System (LMS) on the batch start date
email.nextStep3: Check your email regularly for course updates and announcements
email.seeYouOn: We look forward to seeing you on {batchStartDate}. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
email.footerAutomated: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.
